scenario.name: AI research acceptance
scenario.mission: Convert an AI research output into a bounded Evidence Docket and review-ready decision state.

public_site_rule: No forms · no inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no personal or confidential data.
